text: Standing in this modern, clean space, I feel a quiet sense of anticipation. The empty chairs and the glass walls suggest openness yet also an expectation – perhaps something is about to begin, or reflections are waiting to happen. The second area feels vibrant, lively, with R+D spelled out boldly on the wall. I am surrounded by the spirit of innovation and curiosity. The interplay of colors, screens, and words stimulates my mind, inviting me to ponder the relationship between humans and technology. I feel both grounded by the immediacy of my senses and elevated into abstract thought by the ideas around me.
